SKD HolidaysTaxi · Scooty · Bike · Holidays

Your trusted local travel partner in Dharamshala. We offer reliable taxi service, scooty rentals, bike rentals, and airport transfers across Dharamshala, McLeod Ganj, Bhagsu, Naddi, and beyond.

Near Bus Stand, McLeod Ganj, Dharamshala, Himachal Pradesh 176219

Mon–Fri: 6:00 AM – 10:00 PM

Sat–Sun: 24 Hours

Available 24/7 for airport pickups

SKD Holidays Taxi · Scooty · Bike · Holidays — Serving tourists and locals across Dharamshala, McLeod Ganj, Bhagsu, Naddi, Dharamkot, Triund, Kangra Fort, and Kangra Airport. Book a taxi, rent a scooty, or hire a bike in Dharamshala at the best rates.
